title: Service Operations Desk Playbook
description: Create a Service Operations Desk (SOD): the post-sales execution arm for RMAs, shipping, returns, evals, ticket closure templates, and part collection so support engineers can focus on problem solving and customer resolution.

mindset.principle: If your best solvers are also your shipping clerks, you chose wrong. SOD is traditional RMA done as a real department with a charter.

mistakes.label: Support engineers own packing, labels, and return chase
mistakes.cost: Slow fixes; burnout; lost parts dollars

mistakes.label: SOD becomes the new dump for every undefined task
No clear handoff packet from support to SOD
mistakes.cost: Wrong parts ship; customer pain doubles

mistakes.label: SOD treated as lower caste with no metrics
mistakes.cost: Quality dies; support blames logistics forever

role_split.label: Diagnose, troubleshoot, decide disposition, customer technical truth
Execute RMA/ship/return/eval/closure templates, part collection, logistics liaison

decision_branches.situation: Support owns logistics and problem-solve both
Wrong ship or incomplete return packets

steps.name: Score logistics and support free capacity

agent_signal.use_when: Support engineers shipping parts and handling returns instead of solving. Need SOD / RMA execution arm so support focuses on resolution.
decision_criteria: Handoff packet required before SOD ships.
SOD has metrics; not a silent dump lane.
agent_signal.operator_context: Field pattern: Service Operations Department built so support stops being the ship desk. Traditional RMA group with a real charter.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic job spine. Not legal tax advice on write-offs.
trigger_phrases: Support engineers shipping parts and handling returns instead of solving. Need S
Need playbook: Service Operations Desk Playbook
